key_finding: V>K for result encoding at 4/4 layers (mean gap +0.024), operand encoding, AND unique info (V|MLP ~2x K|MLP). BUT both K and V show SAME encoding→computation transition (K_trans≈V_trans). V-K gap WIDENS at forward-looking offsets (L35: +0.014→+0.072). K-V split is quantitative (V~2x info density) not qualitative (different functional roles). Phase 1 K>V perturbation = routing necessity, not content richness.
evidence_impact: Refines K=routing/V=content framework: K also participates in computation, V is primary carrier with ~2x unique info. Connects Phase 1 perturbation evidence with Phase 2 probing evidence into unified mechanistic story. V forward-looking advantage over K increases at earlier offsets.
next_planned: Cross-model K-V dissociation on Phi (does V|MLP~2x K|MLP hold on MHA/analog?), or new Phase 2 evidence direction
